Frequently asked questions

How is this different from ChatGPT?

We built prompts specifically for review responses. The output references details from the actual review, matches your business tone, and avoids generic AI phrases. You paste, click, copy — done in 10 seconds.

Will responses sound like AI wrote them?

No. We specifically trained the output to avoid "We appreciate your valuable feedback" style clichés. Responses reference specific things the reviewer mentioned and match your chosen tone.

Can I customize the tone?

Yes. Choose from professional, friendly, or casual. You can also add custom instructions like "always mention our new patio" or "we're under new management."

What types of businesses does this work for?

Restaurants, dental offices, salons, auto repair shops, hotels, Airbnbs — any local business that gets Google reviews.

Do you auto-post responses to Google?

Not yet. Right now you copy the response and paste it into Google. We're building a direct Google Business Profile integration for the Pro plan.

What happens after 5 free responses?

You'll need to upgrade to Pro ($49/mo) for unlimited responses, plus you get response history, tone customization, and priority support.

Your next review is waiting.

Join hundreds of business owners who respond to every review — without spending hours writing them.
